description: Memory architecture: Three-Layer Model + context budget rules (V3 → V4 with context cleanup contract)

working_memory.json.role: current-session ops memory — fast turn-to-turn context bridge
working_memory.json.lifespan: one session (persisted across sessions for bootstrap)

unique_fields.last_updated: staleness check / fallback trigger (>30 days → log.md grep)
unique_fields.current_mode: project | query | discussion — current work mode
unique_fields.focus_node: operational focus of current session (what we're doing RIGHT NOW)
unique_fields.open_pages: wiki pages open in context (max 3 per operational_rules)
unique_fields.dead_ends: paths that failed / questions without answers
unique_fields.broken_links_resolved: tracking list for broken link resolution workflow

query_summary.description: snapshot of last query: intent, pages_read, key_findings

working_memory.json.no_session_context_field: DEPRECATED — WM does not have session_context; hot.md has Active Session Context section instead

hot.md.role: long-term snapshot — survives compaction, read on next session bootstrap

unique_fields.active_project: project name + status + focus_node (snapshot for next session)
unique_fields.pending_tasks: issue tracking — unique to hot.md, NOT in WM
unique_fields.recent_changes: detailed chronology from log.md, aggregated with scripts/paths

hot.md.no_duplicate_fields: NEVER duplicate WM content — hot.md aggregates + expands, not copies

log.md.role: append-only chronicle of all actions and wiki changes

field_dedup_rules.focus_node: WM = current operational focus; hot.md = snapshot for next session (same value, different intent)
field_dedup_rules.query_summary_vs_recent_changes: WM.query_summary = single query context; hot.md.recent_changes = aggregated chronology from log
field_dedup_rules.no_cross_field_duplication: If a field exists in WM, it is NOT duplicated as-is in hot.md — hot.md expands/aggregates

session_end: write_to_working_memory (next_steps_todo, open_pages) → write to wiki/hot.md (Active Session Context or Active Project)

log_read_fallback.when: working_memory.json empty or stale (>30 days without updates)
log_read_fallback.constraint: NEVER read entire log (~250+ lines expensive in tokens)

write_triggers.description: After process step completes (ingest/query/lint) — follow HOT-SAVE-ACTION-V1 contract for WM update then hot cache refresh

concurrent_trigger_rule: When multiple triggers fire simultaneously, write ALL relevant sections in one pass (not sequentially)

context_budget_rules.description: Hard limits on what raw content stays in agent context. Prevents token bloat from holding processed documents.
context_budget_rules.principle: Processed source content must be explicitly released after extract — it competes with wiki page writing for limited context window.

rules.name: Source forget-after-extract
rules.description: After reading a source document and extracting to wiki page — the original text must NOT remain in context for subsequent steps.

pattern_prohibited.read_source_A \u2192 read_source_B \u219: Holding N sources simultaneously = O(N) token waste

correct_pattern: extract to wiki page (write to disk)
move to source B — do NOT re-read source A content again

rules.name: Lazy loading for process files
rules.description: Process files (process-*.json) are schema_refs, not read-whole. Only read the specific step that applies to current context.
prohibited: cat/reading entire process-ingest.json (~18KB) when only need step_8a_new_page
Reading all memory_hooks in process-query.json when only need compounding_decision
correct_pattern: Read AGENTS.md or process file once at session start for high-level understanding
At execution time: read ONLY the specific step/section needed via schema_ref
Never hold entire process file content — it's a reference, not data

rules.name: Wiki pages context bubble
rules.description: Max 3 wiki pages in active context simultaneously. When opening new page for reading — close one of the current 3.

constraints.IMMEDIATE_WRITE: Write wiki/hot.md immediately after action, NOT at session end
constraints.SLICE_NOT_FULL_LOG: wiki/hot.md = summary slice only, never full log copy
constraints.RESTORE_ON_COMPACT: After context compaction: call load-hot-cache.sh || true
constraints.SYSTEM_STATE_ALWAYS: System State section updated on every wiki create/update
constraints.NO_APPEND_TO_JSON: Never append to JSON files — read full file → modify → write complete document
constraints.LOG_APPEND_ONLY: wiki/log.md is append-only. NEVER cat > or write(). Always use cat >> (append).

natural_memory_translation.rule: Use 'we' instead of 'system/agent'; translate timestamps to human-time ('the day before yesterday')
